name: Bigos
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Polish sausage cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the sauerkraut and cook until tender.
2. Cut the bacon and fry it in a pot.
3. Add the chopped onion and meat to the frying pan, and continue cooking until the meat is slightly browned.
4. Add water or vegetable stock and bring to a simmer.
5. Reduce heat and add the Polish sausage.
6. Stir in the sauerkraut and cook until all flavors have blended together.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
